name: Thai Mushroom Salad
recipeIngredient: Fresh root ginger, 2.5 cm piece, grated
Mixed mushrooms (e.g., button, oyster, shiitake), sliced, 450 g
Mooli radish (daikon), peeled and grated, 350 g
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all the dressing ingredients.
2. Add the mushrooms, mooli, and spring onions to the bowl and mix well.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow flavors to develop.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
5. Serve over crisp lettuce leaves.
